recap:
- Clean up resources after the demo to avoid unnecessary costs.
- The KA agent creates a vector search endpoint and a serving endpoint for semantic search.
- These endpoints incur charges even when not actively in use.
- To delete the agent, go to the **Agents** section in the navigation pane.
- Locate and select the **Orion_Knowledge_Assistant** agent to access its details.
- Choose **Delete** from the options menu and confirm the deletion.
- Deleting the agent also removes its associated endpoints.
